leadText: A Cornn Berry (Japanese: モコシのみ Mokoshi Fruit) is a type of Berry introduced in Generation III.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Ingredient 1.2 Exchange 1.2.1 Generation IV 1.2.2 Pokémon Dream World 1.2.3 Generation VIII Effect [ edit | edit source ] Cornn Berries cannot be used directly and only have a use as an ingredient, such as for Pokéblocks and Poffins . Ingredient [ edit | edit source ] Berry Blending R S E When blending with NPCs, Cornn Berries will produce the following Pokéblocks : NPC NPCs' Berries Flavors ( 100 RPM ) Feel 1 NPC Dryness 25, Sweetness 12 25 2 NPCs Dryness 25, Bitterness 12 23 3 NPCs Dryness 25, Sourness 12 22 Blend Master Dryness 51, Sweetness 25 48 OR AS Cornn Berries are blue Berries that have a low chance of producing a Pokéblock +. Berry Crush FR LG E Cornn Berries have a base Berry Powder of 150 and a difficulty of 130. With two players, this Berry will contribute 300 units of Berry Powder at 100% silkiness. Poffin Cooking D P Pt BD SP When used alone, Cornn Berries will produce Poffins with Dryness 9, Sweetness 9 and smoothness 29 when cooked in 1 minute with no spills or burns. Ice Cream Scoop DW Flavor 1 Flavor 2 Flavor 3 Easy to scoop Stickiness Juice Shoppe X Y Cornn Berries are purple Berries in Group 1. Composting X Y Cornn Berries are purple Berries. Exchange [ edit | edit source ] Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Diamond, Pearl , and Platinum , the player can exchange Cornn Berries for accessories at the Pick a Peck of Colors Flower Shop . In Pokémon Diamond and Pearl, the player can exchange: 30 Cornn Berries for a Blue Flower 250 Cornn Berries for a Cape In Pokémon Platinum, the player can exchange: 50 Cornn Berries for a Spotlight Pokémon Dream World [ edit | edit source ] In the Pokémon Dream World , the player could exchange Berries for Décor . The following Décor required Cornn Berries. Catalogue Décor Price Plain Catalogue Rocket House 270 Cornn Berries 270 Wepear Berries 270 Pinap Berries Plain Catalogue Starry Mat 35 Cornn Berries 35 Pinap Berries 35 Magost Berries Pokémon Doll Catalogue Houndour Doll 50 Cornn Berries Pokémon Doll Catalogue Duskull Doll 50 Cornn Berries Pokémon Doll Catalogue Munchlax Doll 100 Cornn Berries Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl , the player can exchange Cornn Berries for Stickers at the Pick a Peck of Colors Flower Shop : 10 Cornn Berries for Cool Sticker C

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods R S E Route 123 ( Berry Master ), Sootopolis City Mossdeep Game Corner ( Dodrio Berry Picking with 4 players) E FR LG Joyful Game Corner ( Dodrio Berry Picking with 4 players) Colo XD Trade D P Pt Route 208 ( Berry Master 's house), Amity Square (found by walking Pokémon , given by a man Pt ) Spin Trade (5 players) Pt HG SS Fuchsia City Spin Trade (5 players) PW White Lake B W B2 W2 Transfer from Dream World DW * Rugged Mountain X Y Trade OR AS Route 123 ( Berry Master ), Sootopolis City Hyper Rank Pokémon Contest Spectacular (given by fan) BD SP Amity Square (found by walking Pokémon )

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E P O K é block ingredient. Plant in loamy soil to grow Cornn . FR LG Can be ground up into a powder as an ingredient for medicine. Colo XD An item brought over from a faraway place. D P Pt A Poffin ingredient. Bury it in soft soil to grow a Cornn Plant. HG SS In the Sinnoh region, they like to make sweets known as Poffins with this Berry and feed them to their Pokémon. B W B2 W2 A Berry which is very rare in the Unova region. A maniac will buy it for a high price. X Y A Berry to be used in cooking. This Berry is very rare and hard to obtain in the Unova region. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh LA Used to make Pokéblocks that will enhance your Beauty, this Berry is rare in other regions. BD SP A Poffin ingredient. Bury it in soft soil to grow a Cornn Berry plant. S V Used to make Pokéblocks that will enhance Beauty. This Berry is rare in other regions. Tag information [ edit | edit source ] No. 27 Size: 3.0" (7.5 cm) Firmness: Hard Games Description R S E A Berry from an ancient era. May not grow unless planted in quantity. D P Pt BD SP Its dryness is quite strong. As a result, its true deliciousness can't be appreciated by just eating one or two.

Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods R S E Route 123 ( Berry Master ), Sootopolis City Mossdeep Game Corner ( Dodrio Berry Picking with 4 players) E FR LG Joyful Game Corner ( Dodrio Berry Picking with 4 players) Colo XD Trade D P Pt Route 208 ( Berry Master 's house), Amity Square (found by walking Pokémon , given by a man Pt ) Spin Trade (5 players) Pt HG SS Fuchsia City Spin Trade (5 players) PW White Lake B W B2 W2 Transfer from Dream World DW * Rugged Mountain X Y Trade OR AS Route 123 ( Berry Master ), Sootopolis City Hyper Rank Pokémon Contest Spectacular (given by fan) BD SP Amity Square (found by walking Pokémon ) Growth [ edit | edit source ] Generation III Planted 0 hours Sprouted 6 hours Taller 12 hours Flowering 18 hours Berries 24 hours A Cornn plant will yield 2-4 Berries. Generation IV Planted 0 hours Sprouted 6 hours Taller 12 hours Flowering 18 hours Berries 24 hours A Cornn plant will yield 2-10 Berries. A growing Cornn plant's soil dries by 10% every hour, fully drying out in 10 hours. Generation V Planted 0 hours Sprouted 9 hours Taller 18 hours Flowering 27 hours Berries 36 hours A Cornn plant will yield ? Berries. Generation VI Pokémon X and Y Planted 0 hours Sprouted 4 hours Growing 8 hours Bigger 12 hours Budding 16 hours Bloom 20 hours Berries 24 hours A Cornn plant will yield 3-15 Berries. During its growth, watering the plant adds 1 Berries to the final harvest, weeding it adds 1, and removing a pest adds 3. Cornn plants attract Illumise as pests. Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire Planted 0 hours Sprouted 4 hours Taller 8 hours Flowering 12 hours Berries 16 hours A Cornn plant will yield 3-15 Berries. Generation VII Pokémon Sun, Moon, Ultra Sun, and Ultra Moon Planted 0 hours Sprouted 6 hours Taller 12 hours Flowering 20 hours Berries 24 hours A Cornn plant will yield 4 Berries if Isle Aplenny is at Phase 1, 8 Berries if it is at Phase 2, and 12 Berries if it is at Phase 3. Generation VIII Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl Planted 0 hours Sprouted 6 hours Taller 12 hours Flowering 18 hours Berries 24 hours A Cornn plant will yield 2-10 Berries.
